DSDS 0.1
Overview Root Schema
example extensions link metadata rich-text status usecase
component pattern style theme token
accessibility anatomy api best-practice design-specifications guideline interaction principle purpose scale state variant

DSDS API Guideline

Documents the code-level interface of a component — its configurable properties, emitted events, content slots, CSS custom properties, CSS shadow parts, data attributes, and public methods. When a component supports multiple platforms, each platform gets its own API guideline with the `platform` property identifying which implementation it describes.

Source: guidelines/api.schema.json

8 definitions in this file:

  • apiProperty
  • apiEvent
  • apiSlot
  • apiCssCustomProperty
  • apiCssPart
  • apiDataAttribute
  • apiMethod
  • api

apiProperty

A configurable property of a component. Pairs a human-readable type string with an optional machine-readable JSON Schema for tooling.

object

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
namestringrequiredThe property name as used in code (e.g., 'variant', 'size', 'disabled', 'onClick').
typestringrequiredA human-readable type description for display (e.g., "'primary' | 'secondary' | 'ghost'", 'boolean', 'IconComponent').
descriptionrichTextrequiredWhat this property controls, how it affects the component, and any constraints or side effects.
requiredbooleanrequiredWhether this property must be provided by the consumer.
schemaobjectoptionalA JSON Schema (Draft 2020-12) object defining the property's type in a machine-readable form. Follows the same conventions as OpenAPI parameter schemas.
defaultValueanyoptionalThe default value in its native JSON type. Accepts any JSON type: string (e.g., 'primary'), number (e.g., 44), boolean (e.g., true), object, array, or null.
examplesexample[]optionalExample values for this property.
sincestringoptionalThe version in which this property was introduced.
deprecatedbooleanoptionalWhether this property is deprecated.
deprecationNoticestringoptionalWhat to use instead, if deprecated.

References: richText, example

Example

[
  {
    "name": "variant",
    "type": "'primary' | 'secondary' | 'ghost' | 'danger'",
    "schema": {
      "type": "string",
      "enum": [
        "primary",
        "secondary",
        "ghost",
        "danger"
      ],
      "default": "primary"
    },
    "description": "The visual style of the button. Determines background color, text color, and border treatment.",
    "required": false,
    "defaultValue": "primary",
    "examples": [
      {
        "value": "primary",
        "title": "High-emphasis — the main action on the surface",
        "presentation": {
          "type": "code",
          "code": "<Button variant=\"primary\">Save</Button>",
          "language": "jsx"
        }
      },
      {
        "value": "danger",
        "title": "Destructive — delete, remove, disconnect",
        "presentation": {
          "type": "code",
          "code": "<Button variant=\"danger\">Delete project</Button>",
          "language": "jsx"
        }
      }
    ],
    "since": "1.0.0"
  },
  {
    "name": "disabled",
    "type": "boolean",
    "schema": {
      "type": "boolean",
      "default": false
    },
    "description": "When true, the button is non-interactive. The cursor changes to not-allowed, and the button is visually dimmed to 40% opacity.",
    "required": false,
    "defaultValue": false,
    "since": "1.0.0"
  },
  {
    "name": "loading",
    "type": "boolean",
    "schema": {
      "type": "boolean",
      "default": false
    },
    "description": "When true, the label is replaced with a spinner and the button is non-interactive. The button retains its dimensions to prevent layout shift.",
    "required": false,
    "defaultValue": false,
    "since": "2.1.0"
  },
  {
    "name": "size",
    "type": "'small' | 'medium' | 'large'",
    "schema": {
      "type": "string",
      "enum": [
        "small",
        "medium",
        "large"
      ],
      "default": "medium"
    },
    "description": "The size of the button. Affects padding, font size, icon size, and minimum target area.",
    "required": false,
    "defaultValue": "medium",
    "since": "1.0.0"
  }
]

apiEvent

An event emitted by a component.

object

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
namestringrequiredThe event name (e.g., 'onClick', 'onChange', 'onDismiss').
descriptionrichTextrequiredWhen this event fires, what it communicates, and how consumers should respond.
payloadstringoptionalDescription of the event payload shape (e.g., '(event: MouseEvent) => void', '{ value: string, index: number }').
sincestringoptionalThe version in which this event was introduced.

References: richText

Example

[
  {
    "name": "onClick",
    "description": "Fires when the button is activated via mouse click, touch tap, Enter key, or Space key. Does not fire when the button is disabled or loading.",
    "payload": "(event: MouseEvent) => void",
    "since": "1.0.0"
  },
  {
    "name": "onFocus",
    "description": "Fires when the button receives focus.",
    "payload": "(event: FocusEvent) => void",
    "since": "1.0.0"
  },
  {
    "name": "onBlur",
    "description": "Fires when the button loses focus.",
    "payload": "(event: FocusEvent) => void",
    "since": "1.0.0"
  }
]

apiSlot

A content insertion point of a component.

object

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
namestringrequiredThe slot name. Use 'default' for the unnamed/default slot.
descriptionrichTextrequiredWhat content this slot accepts and any constraints on its children.
acceptedContentrichTextoptionalA description of the allowed content (e.g., 'Plain text or a text node. Do not nest interactive elements.').
sincestringoptionalThe version in which this slot was introduced.

References: richText

Example

[
  {
    "name": "default",
    "description": "The primary content slot. Accepts text, icons, or a combination of both. When both an icon and text are provided, the icon appears before the text by default.",
    "acceptedContent": "Text, Icon, or a combination. Avoid placing interactive elements inside the button.",
    "since": "1.0.0"
  }
]

apiCssCustomProperty

A CSS custom property exposed by a component for external styling.

object

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
namestringrequiredThe full property name including the -- prefix (e.g., '--button-background', '--button-border-radius').
Pattern: ^--
descriptionrichTextrequiredWhat visual attribute this property controls.
defaultValuestringoptionalThe default value of the CSS custom property (e.g., 'var(--color-action-primary)', '1rem', 'transparent').
typestringoptionalThe expected CSS value type (e.g., 'color', 'dimension', 'number').
sincestringoptionalThe version in which this custom property was introduced.

References: richText

Example

[
  {
    "name": "--button-background",
    "description": "The background color of the button container.",
    "defaultValue": "var(--color-action-primary)",
    "type": "color",
    "since": "1.0.0"
  },
  {
    "name": "--button-text-color",
    "description": "The color of the label text.",
    "defaultValue": "var(--color-text-on-action)",
    "type": "color",
    "since": "1.0.0"
  },
  {
    "name": "--button-border-radius",
    "description": "The border radius of the button container.",
    "defaultValue": "var(--radius-medium)",
    "type": "dimension",
    "since": "1.0.0"
  },
  {
    "name": "--button-padding-horizontal",
    "description": "The left and right padding inside the button container.",
    "defaultValue": "var(--space-4)",
    "type": "dimension",
    "since": "1.0.0"
  }
]

apiCssPart

A CSS shadow part exposed by a web component for external styling via ::part() selectors.

object

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
namestringrequiredThe part name as used in ::part() selectors.
descriptionrichTextrequiredWhat element this part exposes and what styling it enables.
sincestringoptionalThe version in which this part was introduced.

References: richText

Example

[
  {
    "name": "base",
    "description": "The root container element of the button. Use for overriding background, border, and padding from outside the shadow DOM.",
    "since": "1.0.0"
  },
  {
    "name": "label",
    "description": "The text label element. Use for overriding font styles from outside the shadow DOM.",
    "since": "1.0.0"
  },
  {
    "name": "icon",
    "description": "The icon wrapper element. Use for adjusting icon size or color from outside the shadow DOM.",
    "since": "2.0.0"
  }
]

apiDataAttribute

A data attribute used by a component to reflect state or variant information into the DOM.

object

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
namestringrequiredThe full attribute name including the data- prefix (e.g., 'data-state', 'data-variant').
Pattern: ^data-
descriptionrichTextrequiredWhat this attribute reflects and how it can be used for styling or testing.
valuesstring[]optionalThe set of possible values (e.g., ['default', 'hover', 'active', 'disabled']).
sincestringoptionalThe version in which this attribute was introduced.

References: richText

Example

[
  {
    "name": "data-variant",
    "description": "Reflects the current variant. Useful for parent-level conditional styling.",
    "values": [
      "primary",
      "secondary",
      "ghost",
      "danger"
    ],
    "since": "1.0.0"
  },
  {
    "name": "data-loading",
    "description": "Present when the button is in a loading state. Useful for CSS selectors that target loading buttons.",
    "values": [
      "true"
    ],
    "since": "2.1.0"
  }
]

apiMethod

A public method on a component instance.

object

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
namestringrequiredThe method name (e.g., 'focus', 'reset', 'scrollTo').
descriptionrichTextrequiredWhat this method does, when to call it, and any side effects.
parametersstringoptionalDescription of the parameter signature (e.g., '(options?: { preventScroll: boolean }) => void').
returnTypestringoptionalDescription of the return value (e.g., 'void', 'Promise<void>', 'HTMLElement | null').
sincestringoptionalThe version in which this method was introduced.

References: richText

Example

[
  {
    "name": "focus",
    "description": "Programmatically moves focus to the button element. Useful after closing a modal or completing a flow that should return focus to the triggering button.",
    "parameters": "(options?: FocusOptions) — optional FocusOptions object with `preventScroll` boolean.",
    "returnType": "void",
    "since": "1.0.0"
  },
  {
    "name": "click",
    "description": "Programmatically triggers the button's click handler. Does not fire if the button is disabled or loading.",
    "parameters": "none",
    "returnType": "void",
    "since": "1.0.0"
  }
]

api

Documents the code-level interface of a component on a single platform. Lists the configurable properties, emitted events, content slots, CSS hooks, data attributes, and public methods that consumers interact with. For multi-platform components (e.g., React + Web Component + Vue), create one API guideline per platform and use the `platform` property to distinguish them.

object

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
type"api"requiredIdentifies this guideline as an API specification.
platformstringoptionalThe platform or framework this API describes. Use when a component has different APIs across platforms (e.g., 'react', 'web-component', 'vue', 'angular', 'ios', 'android'). When omitted, the API is assumed to be the single/default platform.
propertiesapiProperty[]optionalConfigurable properties (props, attributes, inputs) that consumers pass to the component.
eventsapiEvent[]optionalEvents emitted by the component that consumers can listen to.
slotsapiSlot[]optionalContent insertion points where consumers can project child content.
cssCustomPropertiesapiCssCustomProperty[]optionalCSS custom properties exposed for external styling.
cssPartsapiCssPart[]optionalCSS shadow parts exposed for external styling via ::part() selectors.
dataAttributesapiDataAttribute[]optionalData attributes that reflect component state or configuration into the DOM.
methodsapiMethod[]optionalPublic methods available on the component instance.

References: apiProperty, apiEvent, apiSlot, apiCssCustomProperty, apiCssPart, apiDataAttribute, apiMethod

Example

{
  "properties": [
    {
      "name": "variant",
      "type": "'primary' | 'secondary' | 'ghost' | 'danger'",
      "description": "The visual style of the button.",
      "required": false,
      "defaultValue": "primary",
      "since": "1.0.0"
    },
    {
      "name": "disabled",
      "type": "boolean",
      "description": "When true, the button is non-interactive.",
      "required": false,
      "defaultValue": false,
      "since": "1.0.0"
    }
  ],
  "events": [
    {
      "name": "onClick",
      "description": "Fires when the button is activated.",
      "payload": "(event: MouseEvent) => void",
      "since": "1.0.0"
    }
  ],
  "slots": [
    {
      "name": "default",
      "description": "The primary content slot.",
      "acceptedContent": "Text, Icon, or a combination.",
      "since": "1.0.0"
    }
  ],
  "cssCustomProperties": [
    {
      "name": "--button-background",
      "description": "The background color of the button container.",
      "defaultValue": "var(--color-action-primary)",
      "type": "color",
      "since": "1.0.0"
    }
  ],
  "cssParts": [
    {
      "name": "base",
      "description": "The root container element of the button.",
      "since": "1.0.0"
    }
  ],
  "dataAttributes": [
    {
      "name": "data-variant",
      "description": "Reflects the current variant.",
      "values": [
        "primary",
        "secondary",
        "ghost",
        "danger"
      ],
      "since": "1.0.0"
    }
  ],
  "methods": [
    {
      "name": "focus",
      "description": "Programmatically moves focus to the button element.",
      "parameters": "(options?: FocusOptions)",
      "returnType": "void",
      "since": "1.0.0"
    }
  ],
  "type": "api"
}
↑ Back to top
